title: SaturdaySMP Client Modpack
description: The modpack for the SaturdaySMP server, updated 31 May 2025.
body:
# SaturdaySMP modpack
SaturdaySMP is a server with unique characters, rich lore, and other stuff, originally launched in 2020. To be able to play in the server, you need to install this SatSMP modpack (credits to **Mczie Hosting** for the server hosting).

> ### Season 4.5 details
> *Capture all the creatures, visit various varied ecosystems, adore agriculture, and be the very best player...* because this season features Cobblemon, Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Farmer's Delight!

## Modpack information
The [SatSMP client modpack 4.5.4](https://modrinth.com/modpack/satsmp/version/SSa54Mor) adds Cobblemon and popular add-ons based on the work of [Jonathan's Playroom](https://www.youtube.com/@JonathansPlayroomYT/videos) with the [Cobblemon Expanded modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jonathans-cobblemon-pack). It also has new biomes and terrain generation provided by Oh The Biomes We've Gone, as well as new gameplay mechanics from Farmer's Delight

<details>
<summary>Full list of features (expand me!)</summary>

## _A unique flavor of Cobblemon..._

[**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), a Pokémon mod for Minecraft, which adds over 700 Pokemon with vanilla-style blocky models you can catch to expand your team, record in your Pokedex, battle using the Pokemon Showdown engine, level up to unlock new moves, evolve with branching evolutions, store in a Pasture block to let them freely roam, trade with friends, and battle with enemies. Some Legends Arceus-style mechanics, such as move relearning, physically running from battle, and evolving your Pokemon when you decide. Heal Pokemons using the healing machine, berries which can be found in the wild and cross-bred to mutate new berries, or medicine items from brewing. Ancient structures in the world to discover, and fossils can be found by excavation and can be revived using a resurrection machine. The mod is in active development, so not all gameplay features are present yet and we need other mods to be able to fully enjoy Cobblemon.

**[Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod)** lets you battle over 700 trainers, including Gym Leaders and Elite Four members, with level caps ensuring a true challenge. Use your Trainer Card to track progress
- **[RCT Textures Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rct-trainer-textures-plus)** (resource pack)
- **[Cobblemon RCT Trainer Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rct-trainer-animation)** (resource pack)

**[CobbleTowns: Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbletowns-continued)** to explore villages based on iconic Pokémon towns like Pallet Town and Lavender Town, complete with Pokémon Centers, Poké Marts, and NPCs that truly bring the world to life

**[Cobblemon: Legendary Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legendarystructures)** – Legendary Pokémon like Rayquaza, Mewtwo, and the Legendary Birds spawn in unique structures, some requiring puzzles to access (server datapack)

[**PokeLoot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokeloot) spawns Pokeballs in the world that contain loot (server mod)

**[Cobblemon Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)** introduces Mega Evolution, Z-Moves, and Terastallization. Equip the right items and unleash powerful transformations mid-battle

**[CobblemonRider](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5)** to ride Pokémon across land, water, sky, and even lava

**[CobbleDollars](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars)** to earn bucks when fighting wild Pokemons

**[Cobblemon Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)** implements Pokemon breeding by leaving compatible Pokémon in Pastures and hatching eggs over time

Extra Cobblemon items and blocks:
- **[Cobblemon Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy)** for an in-game Cobblemon wiki
- **[CobbleHats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblehats)**
- **[Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges)**
- **[Pokeblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokeblocks)** adds Pokedolls you can only find in chests
- **[Pokenav](htts://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav)** to track Pokemon spawns in your area and get guidance toward specific Pokemon you’re searching for
- **[BadgeBox](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-badgebox)**, 
- **[SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon)**
- **[Cobblemon Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-armors)** and **[Cobblemon Armors Feature](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-armors-feature)**

Tweaks and quality-of-life improvements like:
- **[Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations)** for integrations with other mods used in this modpack: JEI, Jade and Waystones (see below)
- **[More Cobblemon Move Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cobblemon-move-anims)**
- **[MoreCoblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cobblemon-tweaks)**
- **[Box Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-box-link)**
- **[Show Held Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-held-items)**
- **[Spawn Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification)**
- **[Cobblemon UI Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-ui-tweaks)**
- **[Cobblemon Text Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-text-fix)** (resource pack)
- **[CobbleMotion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemotion)** (resource pack)
- **[3D Poke Rods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-3d-poke-rods)**
- **[3D Pokenavs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-3d-pokenavs)**
- **[Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-classic-grass-pack)** changes Minecraft’s grass to match the classic pixel art aesthetic of Game Boy Pokémon games
- **[Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface)** (resource pack) and **[Cobblemon Interface: Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded)** (resource pack) changes the Minecraft hotbar and inventory to fit the Cobblemon aesthetics
- **[Cobblemon Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-emissive-ores)** (resource pack)

## _New biomes and generation to explore..._
**[Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)** adds a ton of new biomes, unique mobs, structures and blocks ([wiki page](https://github.com/Potion-Studios/Oh-The-Biomes-Weve-Gone/wiki))

Small tweaks including:
- **[Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)** adds various treasure items \
[items from the mod including various necklaces, hats, boots and other pieces of clothing](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/37985539/118691060-fdaaa400-b808-11eb-97c8-2f45ef277c52.png)

## _New gameplay mechanics to keep things fresh..._
[**Farmer's Delight (Refabricated)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - a mod that expands farming and cooking mechanics in Minecraft

**[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)** ([wiki page](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/Supplementaries/wiki)) brings a ton of features: naturally generating way signs and wild flax plants, functional items like blackboards and signposts, redstone blocks like weather vanes and crystal display, decorations like pedestals and globes, and functional blocks like cannons and bombs

## _Tweaks and additions to the game..._
New player actions like:
- **[Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on)** to carry mobs and entities like chests and signs

New items and blocks like:
- **[Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)** tweaks existing vanilla blocks: cauldron potion mixing, wall lanterns and lantern holding animation, skull piles and candle skulls, and better lectern GUI
- **[Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)** adds various furniture
- **[Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass)** to search for specific biomes, useful for finding rare Pokémon habitats \
![Nature's compass item recipe](http://i.imgur.com/175k4oE.png)

Small user interface tweaks like:
- **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** adds various food-related HUD improvements
- **[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)**
- **[Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)**
- **[Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)**
- **[Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds)**
- **[Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)** to teleport between locations
- **[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)** and **[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** displays nearby mobs including Cobblemon mobs
- Sounds mods: **[Auditory](https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory-continued/version/0.0.7-1.21.1)**, **[Cool Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain/version/1.1.0-1.21.1)**, **[Sound](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound/version/2.4.11+1.21-fabric)**

## _Improvements to Minecraft performance and networking..._
Visual:
- ~~**[bad packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets)** allows packet messaging between different modding platforms~~ (not used)
- **[Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)**
- **[Fast Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-item-frames)**
- **[Fast Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-paintings)**
- **[FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)**
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** is an optimization mod which improves frame rates, micro-stutter, and fixes many graphical issues
  - **[Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights)**
  - **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)**
  - **[Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks)**

### Included shaders
- **[Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)** makes the game look more realistic with tons of details and optimizations

### Override files
- **SaturdaySMP S4.5 - Addon + Texture Pack.zip** is a resource pack developed specifically for this modpack which adds a custom home screen logo.
- **Cobblemon Loading Screen.zip** for the Cobblestudios loading screen
- **SwapBallsReborn 1.1 RP.zip**
- **Terry to Blue.zip**
  
</details>

## Client installation
*Do you want to play in the SaturdaySMP server or a similar server?*

It's required to have at least 4 GB of RAM and 700 MB of storage space (when fully downloaded, the modpack takes about 550 MB of space.)
- Download a _launcher_ which can read Modrinth modpacks. I recommend [the Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app), but you can use [SKLauncher](https://skmedix.pl/downloads), [MultiMC](https://multimc.org), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org), [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com), [BakaXL](https://www.bakaxl.com/), or [Superpack](https://github.com/Gaming32/Superpack/releases).
- [Download the _modpack_ from Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/satsmp#download), and import it in your launcher of choice. It's recommended to run with a minimum of 4 GB of memory.
- Import the modpack you downloaded into your launcher.

## For server owners
*Do you want to create a server using SaturdaySMP mods?*

## Licensing and Credits
To comply with licensing restrictions, every mod and resource pack used in the modpack are linked above. No mods and resource packs **except the ones mentioned below** is redistributed in the modpack file as an embedded file.

The resource packs listed below are from [Cobblemon Expanded 1.1.4](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jonathans-cobblemon-pack/version/1.1.4) made by [Jonathan's Playroom](https://modrinth.com/user/JonathansPlayroom):
- **Cobblemon Loading Screen.zip**
- **SwapBallsReborn 1.1 RP.zip**
- **Terry to Blue.zip**

<details>
<summary>More technical stuff</summary>

The _modpack_ means the `.mrpack` file ([see the file format](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802351-modrinth-modpack-format-mrpack)) hosted in this page.

Mods, datapacks, resource packs and shaderpacks can be _linked inside_ the modpack, which means a url is linked in `modrinth.index.json` for your client to download; or they can be _embedded in_ the modpack, which means the mod file is zipped in the `overrides/` directory.

</details>
